creator: vas@sibptus.ru
text:
(In reply to Conrad Meyer from comment #2)
> So we're still potentially in violation if we implement patent-covered portions of exfat in base.

Well, /etc/autofs/special_media could use exfatlabel from sysutils/fusefs-exfat to obtain the label. Otherwise how are we going to show friendly labels in /media for exfat volumes?
